block.text: You check the wrecked Tripods. You are in luck! Thanks to their modular design, one has a piece of undamaged armour-plate that will fit any robot. You can attach it now, or save it until later (though you may not install it during a battle). It will restore t point of ARMOUR, though this may not raise your roboes ARMOUR score above its Initial score. It may be used only once! Turn to 293.
